title: Word Pattern II
input_format: The first line is the string pattern. The second line is the string s.
explanation: This is a backtracking problem. We try to map each character in pattern to a substring in s. We maintain a hash map of char to string and a set of used strings to ensure bijection.

boilerplate.python:
import sys

def solve(pattern, s):
    pass

if __name__ == '__main__':
    lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
    pattern = lines[0].strip() if len(lines) > 0 else ""
    s = lines[1].strip() if len(lines) > 1 else ""
    print(solve(pattern, s))
